(M0246) Case Mix Dx - Secndry ICD10; 5, Col4 This field lists optional diagnosis (ICD-10), column 4. CHAR 8 x x
M1033_HOSP_RISK_HSTRY_FALLS M1033 (M1032) Risk For Hosp - History Of Falls This field is checked if the patient is at risk for hospitalization due to history of falls. (2 or more falls - or any fall with an injury -in the past 12 months) 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x x
